raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The North Bay Legislative Delegation helped pass a funding bill allocating $185 million to advance wildfire mitigation projects across California.",
    "The funding will directly support vegetation management and fuel treatment programs across the state.",
    "A major investment of $33.5 million has been allocated to the State Coastal Conservancy for wildfire mitigation projects in the North Coast region.",
    "The delegation partnered with the Karuk Tribe to secure $10 million in state funding to build a regional Fire Training Center in northeastern Humboldt County.",
    "The Karuk Fire Training Center will provide cultural and prescribed fire training, wildfire risk reduction, climate resilience, and emergency response training.",
    "The state investment builds on a prior grant of $1.2 million awarded to the Karuk Tribe for the design and engineering of the Fire Training Center.",
    "The $185 million funding is part of a multi-pronged commitment to expand firefighting resources across the state.",
    "The funding will be disbursed to six land conservancies across California.",
    "The new fire resiliency center will enable the Karuk Tribe to share their internationally-recognized expertise on wildfire management.",
    "Investing in wildfire prevention and mitigation will save families from the pain of losing their homes."
  ]
}
```
